description: Artistic Word-by-Word Video Generator - Create scroll-stopping social media videos with dynamic typography, where each word appears on its own artistic frame with varying fonts, colors, positions, backgrounds (solid/gradient), and effects (shadows, glow, highlights). Accepts .ass/.srt captions or generates them via Whisper, combines with voiceover audio.

userStories.title: Add bundled Google Fonts TTF files to project
userStories.description: As a developer, I need eye-catching fonts bundled in the project for deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Create fonts/ directory in project root

Add a FONTS.md file documenting 25-30 Google Fonts to download (Bebas Neue, Oswald, Anton, Archivo Black, Passion One, Permanent Marker, Pacifico, Caveat, Montserrat Bold, Poppins Bold, Lobster, Bangers, Righteous, Fredoka One, Luckiest Guy, Black Ops One, Russo One, Rubik Bold, Titan One, Boogaloo, Kaushan Script, Rock Salt, Shadows Into Light, Quicksand Bold, Raleway Black)
Add a download_fonts.py script that downloads these fonts from Google Fonts API
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Google Fonts are free for commercial use. Script should download TTF files to fonts/ directory.

userStories.title: Update Dockerfile to include bundled fonts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the bundled fonts available in the Docker container for Render deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Copy fonts/ directory to Docker image at /app/fonts
Add fonts directory to fontconfig search paths
Run fc-cache to register new fonts
Dockerfile builds successfully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001 fonts being present

userStories.title: Create font registry utility module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a utility to list available fonts and validate font names.
acceptanceCriteria: Create font_registry.py with FontRegistry class
get_available_fonts() returns list of font names from fonts/ directory
get_font_path(font_name) returns absolute path to TTF file
is_valid_font(font_name) validates font exists
get_random_font() returns random font from available fonts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create complementary color palette generator
userStories.description: As a developer, I need color utilities that generate readable, complementary color combinations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create color_utils.py module
generate_complementary_palette() returns background color, font color, and optional highlight color
All palettes ensure minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for readability (WCAG AA)
Support solid colors and gradient color pairs
Include 10+ curated base palettes (coral/teal, purple/gold, etc.) that get randomized
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Reference images show coral/teal, blue gradient/gold, peach/cyan+green combinations

userStories.title: Create style randomization engine
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an engine that generates random but cohesive style choices for each frame.
acceptanceCriteria: Create style_engine.py module
StyleEngine class with generate_frame_style() method

Returns dict with: font_name, font_size, font_color, background_type (solid/gradient), background_colors, text_position (x,y), text_rotation, highlight_style (none/box/brush), shadow_enabled, glow_enabled
Integrates with font_registry and color_utils
Position choices include: center, top-third, bottom-third, left-offset, right-offset
Font size randomized within readable range (80-200px), with automatic reduction for longer words to ensure they fit within frame bounds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create artistic frame generator - basic text rendering
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to generate image frames with styled text on solid color backgrounds.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frame_generator.py module using Pillow (PIL)
Add Pillow to requirements.txt
FrameGenerator class with generate_frame(word, style, dimensions) method
Renders text centered or at specified position
Supports solid color backgrounds
Supports custom fonts from font_registry
Returns PIL Image object
Supports 1080x1920 (9:16 portrait), 1080x1080 (1:1 square), and 1920x1080 (16:9 landscape) dimensions
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add gradient background support to frame generator
userStories.description: As a developer, I need frames to support gradient backgrounds.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend frame_generator.py with gradient support
Support linear gradients (vertical, horizontal, diagonal)
Gradient defined by two colors from style dict
Gradient direction randomized or specified in style
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Reference 'IMAGINE' image shows blue-to-teal vertical gradient

userStories.title: Add highlight box/shape support to frame generator
userStories.description: As a developer, I need frames to support colored highlight shapes behind text.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend frame_generator.py with highlight support
Support rectangular highlight box behind text
Support angled/parallelogram highlight shape
Highlight color from style dict
Highlight padding configurable
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Reference 'You' image shows green parallelogram highlight behind cyan text

userStories.title: Add drop shadow and glow effects to frame generator
userStories.description: As a developer, I need text effects like shadows and glow for visual impact.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend frame_generator.py with shadow effect
Drop shadow with configurable offset, blur, and color
Glow effect with configurable radius and color
Effects enabled/disabled via style dict
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Reference 'IMAGINE' shows golden glow, 'Loudly' shows spray paint shadow effect

userStories.title: Add text rotation and varied positioning to frame generator
userStories.description: As a developer, I need text to appear at different angles and positions for dynamic variety.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend frame_generator.py with rotation support
Support rotation angles from -15 to +15 degrees
Position text at various screen locations (not just center)
Ensure rotated text stays within frame bounds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create caption parser for word-level timing extraction
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to parse SRT and ASS files to extract individual words with their timing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create caption_parser.py module
parse_srt(file_path) extracts words with start_time and end_time
parse_ass(file_path) extracts words with start_time and end_time
Returns list of dicts: [{word, start_time, end_time}, ...]
Handles multi-word subtitle lines by distributing timing evenly or using word-level tags if present
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: ASS files may have karaoke timing tags (\k) for precise word timing

userStories.title: Create video assembler to combine frames with audio
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to assemble image frames into a video synced with audio.
acceptanceCriteria: Create video_assembler.py module
VideoAssembler class with assemble(frames_with_timing, audio_path, output_path, format) method
frames_with_timing is list of (PIL Image, start_time, end_time) tuples
Uses FFmpeg to create video from frames
Each frame displays for its word's duration
Audio track added from mp3 file
Supports 9:16 portrait, 1:1 square, and 16:9 landscape output formats
Output is H.264 MP4 optimized for web
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use FFmpeg concat demuxer or image2 input with duration per frame

userStories.title: Create API request/response models for artistic video endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Pydantic models for the new endpoint's request and response.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ArtisticVideoRequest model to main.py
Request fields: caption_url (optional), audio_url (optional), video_url (optional, extracts audio), output_format (9:16, 1:1, or 16:9, default 9:16)
Add ArtisticVideoResponse model with status, download_url, message fields
Validation: at least one of audio_url, video_url, or file upload required
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File uploads handled separately via Form/UploadFile

userStories.title: Create artistic video endpoint with URL inputs
userStories.description: As a user, I want to generate artistic word videos by providing URLs to caption and audio files.
acceptanceCriteria: Add POST /generate-artistic-video endpoint to main.py
Accepts caption_url (.ass or .srt) and audio_url (.mp3) OR video_url (extracts audio from video)
Downloads files, parses captions, generates frames, assembles video
Returns JSON with download_url to final video
Uses unique ID for concurrent request safety
Proper error handling with HTTPException
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Follow existing endpoint patterns in main.py

userStories.title: Add file upload support to artistic video endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload caption and audio files directly instead of providing URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: Add POST /generate-artistic-video-upload endpoint
Accepts caption_file (UploadFile, optional) and audio_file (UploadFile, optional) OR video_file (UploadFile, optional - extracts audio)
Accepts output_format as Form field
Validation: at least one of audio_file or video_file required
If video_file provided, extract audio using VideoProcessor.extract_audio()
Saves uploads to temp directory for processing
Returns same response format as URL endpoint
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use python-multipart for file uploads (already in requirements for FastAPI)

userStories.title: Add Whisper transcription option for caption-less mode
userStories.description: As a user, I want to generate artistic videos without providing a caption file by having the system transcribe the audio.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend both artistic video endpoints to work without caption file
When no caption provided, use Whisper to transcribe audio
Extract word-level timing from Whisper transcription result
Integrate with existing KaraokeSubtitleGenerator.transcribe_with_timing()
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Whisper model already loaded at startup in existing code

userStories.title: Add custom font upload endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload custom TTF fonts to use in my artistic videos.
acceptanceCriteria: Add POST /upload-font endpoint
Accepts TTF file upload
Validates file is valid TTF font
Saves to fonts/ directory with sanitized filename
Returns font name for use in future requests
Updates font registry to include new font
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Consider security: validate TTF magic bytes, sanitize filename

userStories.title: Add endpoint to list available fonts
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see what fonts are available for artistic video generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add GET /fonts endpoint
Returns JSON list of available font names
Includes both bundled fonts and user-uploaded fonts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update API documentation for new endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the API documentation updated with the new artistic video endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Update API_DOCUMENTATION.md with /generate-artistic-video endpoint
Update API_DOCUMENTATION.md with /generate-artistic-video-upload endpoint
Update API_DOCUMENTATION.md with /upload-font endpoint
Update API_DOCUMENTATION.md with /fonts endpoint
Include request/response examples
Document supported output formats
Typecheck passes
